game.name: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban (PC)

run.comment: Run was so good that I forgot to highlight it

Probably my greatest speedrun to date
https://youtu.be/9b8rfB2tlYA
gotta love when a well pixie costs you 30+ seconds.

From my Insane% run

This PB was extremely free. I unfortunately missed a shield in Carpe so I had to play that twice (couldn't reset bec multirun). Still PB'ed by over 10 mins. Decent run but with free timesave for next time!
Better run but I still have a lot to learn.

OMG WHAT WAS THIS RUN!?

Was aiming for sub 1:40 and got sub 1:30. Saved 15:30 on PB which is insane. Thank you sooooooooo much Blaze for teaching me to not hold W on red rings and thank you me for actually only missing 1 cauldron cake this run.

I think this is it for my All Reqs journey for now, on to 100%!

First ever run so wasn't fully familiar with the route but happy with it .

Looking forward to beating this very soon

So I suck at timing right, I doubt that will ever change lmfao
